text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Walking through the park one day, I<n>spot someone
climbing over the<n>barriers fencing the pond. Is that
who<n>I think it is?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's all over... I should just chuck<n>myself in and let
the waters claim<n>me...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Trainer?! Don't try to stop me! I'm no<n>better than
the algae at the bottom of<n>this pond, so I might as
well join it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I should let the current whisk me<n>away, have the
fish nibble at my<n>body, and wait for the swans to
pull<n>me out and resuscitate me!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: It's... It's... Well, look at this.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: She shows me a news article about<n>the Kinko Sho.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru was almost<n>unbearable to
watch.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Her results aren't the issue—it's<n>simply that the
miniscule amount of<n>effort she puts in on the track
makes<n>it uncomfortable to look at her.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
She doesn't take any pride in herself<n>as an
athlete or show any sense of<n>the showmanship
her fans desire.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: As a racing fan, I find it difficult toeven... Sniffle... "call her anUmamusume. She's more like a"...Sob...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Urk! You didn't have to read the last<n>part!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But... they're right. It's all true. Every<n>word hurts
so much to hear, I wish<n>my ears would just fall
off...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I had it all wrong. I thought all I<n>needed was luck
on my side—that<n>everyone would be okay with it...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But I should have known it wasn't<n>okay. Now
I've gone too far and even<n>said horrible things to
Suzuka...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Not to mention, I don't even know<n>how to begin
apologizing to all my<n>fans...
choice_data_list: You still have the Takarazuka Kinen.
You still have the Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Wait... you're right. Spring has<n>only begun. I
could turn things around<n>at the Takarazuka Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: But... No, it's no good. It won't work,<n>Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
We're forgetting one crucial point.<n>The fans decide
who runs at the<n>Takarazuka Kinen—not us!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
After all I've done, who would bother<n>throwing my
name in the hat? I've<n>already gone and betrayed
them.

Thank you for trying to make me feel<n>better. I
know I've disappointed you<n>too.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's probably too late, but I'll try to<n>find some way
to make it up to you...

For now, I'll just feed the fish in the<n>pond and
head back.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru begins to throw<n>bits of bread
into the pond, and the<n>koi happily gobble it up.
